init.description: Initialize the AI-Enderun framework with a specific adapter (gemini, claude, cursor, codex)

status.description: Display the current project status, active phase, and task list from PROJECT_MEMORY.md

check.description: Perform a health check on framework files and MCP server status

trace:new.description: Generate a new Trace ID (ULID) and add a task to the active memory

api:list.description: Show all domain files and endpoint counts in the {{FRAMEWORK_DIR}}/docs/api/ folder

verify-contract.description: Verify if the shared-types implementation matches the stored contract hash

git:snapshot.description: Create a phase-based git snapshot and tag for the current state

code:scan.description: Perform a deep scan of the codebase architecture and dependencies

ui:audit.description: Audit the UI components for Panda CSS compliance and Zero UI Policy

mobile:check.description: Verify the health and consistency of the mobile (React Native/Expo) application

native:check.description: Verify the desktop (Tauri/Electron) integration and OS-level security
